name: Charred Tomato Jalapeno Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Brush jalapenos and tomatoes with olive oil, then cook on the grill until the skin is charred.
2. Let peppers and tomatoes cool, then coarsely chop the tomatoes and slice the jalapenos thin.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine remaining ingredients (including salt and pepper) with the chopped jalapenos and tomatoes. Whisk until blended.
4. Bring the mixture to room temperature before serving.
5. Spoon vinaigrette over fish as soon as it comes off the grill and serve immediately.
Yield: 2 cups
